title: Belgrado Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Belgrado with a Z-Score of +3.11. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Belgrado has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.9 GG. 
 The low humidity of 27% and moderate wind speed of 6.5 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city is experiencing no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating the extreme heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
